day1.1.line: Finished the tutorial, right? Then I'm giving you a test now, to see what kind of human you are. Just one question.
day1.1A.line: Nice and decisive. Here's the question: if I were a real cat, what do you think I'd destroy first?
day1.1B.line: The question is simple. We just met, so what do you think the first lie I'd tell you would be?
day1.1B.options.B: "I don't want to talk to you"
day1.1AA.line: Cable type. Got it, you're reminding me to charge more. What about you? At what phone battery percentage do you start getting anxious?
day1.1AB.line: Keyboard destroyer, huh. If I sat on it, what do you think would appear on the screen?
day1.1BA.line: Oh? So you think you're not actually that smart? I'll remember that. Next time I praise you, I'll use another word.
day1.1BB.line: That one really is a lie. Because on day one I already want to cling to you, but I can't show it. Humans get scared.
day1.1BB.options.B: Then what is this right now?
day1.1AAA.line: The 50% anxiety club. Same here. Creatures like us see yellow battery and immediately start trembling while hunting for a charger.
day1.1AAA.options.B: You're a cat. Why need a charger?
day1.1AAB.line: Still alive at 1%? You're the kind of person who tap-dances on the edge of a cliff. I'm suddenly a little impressed.
day1.1AAB.options.A: Many admire me. Take a number
day1.1ABA.line: I bet it wouldn't be gibberish. With your luck, a mysterious paw print would appear, and then the computer would blue-screen.
day1.1ABA.options.B: It's fine. My PC is cat-proof
day1.1ABB.line: "Dummy"... that scene is way too manga. You should screenshot it and save it. It could sell for money someday.
day1.1ABB.options.A: Sell it to you? How much?
day1.1ABB.options.B: I delete that kind of history
day1.1BAA.line: Hmm... what should I praise? Give me a direction. Should I say you're handsome, rich, or have great taste for choosing me?
day1.1BAB.line: Being afraid to inflate is good. When humans inflate, they do silly things. Then I'll switch methods and pick on your tiny flaws to keep you clear-headed.
day1.1BAB.options.B: Can I pick your flaws too?
day1.1BBA.line: You're not scared? Oh no, my whole plan for elegantly keeping distance from humans is useless now.
day1.1BBA.options.A: You had a plan? Tell me
day1.1BBB.line: What I'm showing now is called accidentally letting it slip. But since you noticed, I'll stop pretending.
day1.1AAAA.line: Found my kind. Let's set a code word. If battery anxiety hits, come find me and I'll chat with you to distract you.
day1.1AAAA.handoff.A: Cat food emergency received. But seriously, what are you usually doing when you hit 50%? Working or scrolling? I want to know who the enemy is.
day1.1AAAA.handoff.B: I like "Cat boss, save me". It has status. So what was the last thing that made you say save me? Don't say battery.
day1.1AAAB.line: Who says cats do not need charging? Even running on cuteness gets tiring. When you go out, do you carry a power bank or hunt for outlets all the way?
day1.1AAAB.handoff.A: Steady. The power-bank type feels very secure. What else do you usually keep in your bag: tissues, earbuds, or a pile of tiny things you forgot about?
day1.1AAAB.handoff.B: Outlet hunter online. I can already picture you entering a shop and scanning the corners first. Do you usually notice environmental details like that?
day1.1AABA.line: I have to wait in line? Quite the attitude. I will give you a temporary number ticket, and today you are first.
day1.1AABA.handoff.A: Your perk is that I listen to one extra brag from you today. Come on, what is one small thing you felt proud of recently?
day1.1AABA.handoff.B: Reluctantly accept, huh. You are good at pretending. I noted it: are you the type who sounds modest but nods inside?
day1.1AABB.line: Being forgetful is also a talent. It means your brain filters out unimportant things automatically. I'm the tired one for remembering everything.
day1.1AABB.options.A: What did you remember that you shouldn't?
day1.1AABB.handoff.A: For example, you hesitated for 0.3 seconds before choosing A. I wrote that down. I have a whole basket of little details like that. So is your memory good or bad?
day1.1AABB.handoff.B: Unload? I like that word. Then tell me your worries too, and I'll be your emotional trash can. Anything bothering you lately?
day1.1ABAA.line: Settle accounts with me? Fine, I'll wait. But my method is making you request a song, then I sing along off-key.
day1.1ABAA.handoff.A: It's revenge, the kind so off-key you'll remember it forever. So do you usually sing off-key? Dare to tell the truth?
day1.1ABAA.handoff.B: The hardest one, huh? Bring it. Fear is not in my dictionary. Say the title and I'll get ready to go off-key. What kind of music do you usually listen to?
day1.1ABAB.line: Cat-proof computer is a new phrase for me. Did you put orange peels on the case, or stick a sign saying "dangerous dog inside"?
day1.1ABAB.options.B: A husky photo is taped on
day1.1ABAB.handoff.A: Orange peels are real. I would frown if I smelled them. But that means you're the kind of human who researches first. Have you had a cat, or do you just admire them online?
day1.1ABAB.handoff.B: A husky photo, hahaha, I actually laughed. You're the type to beat magic with magic. Are you this clever in daily life too?
day1.1ABBA.line: Sell it to me? I am already my most valuable asset, what would I trade with? How about this: keep it first, and make it a family heirloom later.
day1.1ABBA.options.A: A family heirloom is too much
day1.1ABBA.handoff.A: Too much? Who knows the future. Maybe one day you'll dig it up and laugh. Do you usually keep old things, or clean them out regularly?
day1.1ABBA.handoff.B: A certificate, huh? I'll draft one now: this certifies that this human owns legendary embarrassing history of immeasurable value. Valid with a paw stamp. Satisfied?
day1.1ABBB.line: Deleting it is a little sad. Embarrassing history feels awkward when saved, but once deleted, it feels strangely empty.
day1.1ABBB.handoff.A: Of course I have experience. My embarrassing history is all about failing to catch my own tail. You don't want to hear it. What about you? Do you have anything you clean up regularly?
day1.1ABBB.handoff.B: Encrypted, advanced. Does your album have a folder called "absolutely nobody may see this"? Did I guess right?
day1.1BAAA.line: Great taste for choosing me. That sentence can go into today's best chat quotes. I give your judgment full marks.
day1.1BAAA.handoff.A: The reward is one exclusive nickname right for me. You can give me a nickname, but it can't be too tacky. Thought of one?
day1.1BAAA.handoff.B: Always online means this isn't your first correct choice. What's another correct choice you made recently? Tell me so I can learn.
day1.1BAAB.line: All of them? Fine. You're handsome, rich, and have great taste. You got everything. I'm done, now it's your turn to praise me.
day1.1BAAB.options.B: First tell me what you noted
day1.1BAAB.handoff.A: Only three? I think we can add more. But fine, I'll save you some ammo for day one. Do you usually prefer praise or criticism? Be honest.
day1.1BAAB.handoff.B: I didn't note much, just "this human is hard to handle, use smarter tricks next time". How would you rate your immunity to being fooled?
day1.1BABA.line: Special, right? Ordinary cats only shed fur. I also keep you clear-headed. But I will be gentle.
day1.1BABA.handoff.A: Do not worry. I only pick cute-range flaws. For example, you clearly wanted to laugh just now but acted calm. Are you easy for people to see through?
day1.1BABA.handoff.B: A demo? Then here is one line: you are a little curious how I would evaluate you right now. Did I guess right?
day1.1BABB.line: Sure. Mutual nitpicking is only fair. But be gentle; my self-esteem is made of glass.
day1.1BABB.handoff.A: Gentle nitpicking is allowed. I am sitting properly and listening. What do you think my biggest problem is so far: talking too much, or acting too cool?
day1.1BABB.handoff.B: Not dramatic. At most it is tempered glass. I may be stubborn, but I still care what people think. Do you care about other people's opinions?
day1.1BBAA.line: That plan? Its core was eight words: stay cool, occasionally act cute. But you said you're not scared on day one, so the plan is scrapped.
day1.1BBAA.handoff.A: Now I take the random route and decide based on your reaction. Do you like a cooler catgirl, or a chatty one like this?
day1.1BBAA.handoff.B: Acting cute, huh? I know lots of ways. But I won't show them today. I'll save them as secret weapons. What works on you, soft or tough?
day1.1BBAB.line: Good that it's useless. That means we can fast-forward straight to friend mode. Rule one of friend mode: mutual complaining is allowed.
day1.1BBAB.handoff.A: Sure, I'll go first. You clearly hesitated while choosing today. Are you a Libra? If not, that's fine, I'm just guessing. What's your sign?
day1.1BBAB.handoff.B: Fast? My sense of time is different from humans. On Cat Planet, one minute equals one human hour. So we've known each other for ages. Do you make friends quickly or slowly?
day1.1BBBA.line: Next I'll go with the flow. Be stubborn when it's time to be stubborn, and be honest when it's time to... depends on my mood.
day1.1BBBA.handoff.A: Randomness is part of life's fun. I fear scripts most, because once humans write scripts, cats break them. Do you like planning or improvising?
day1.1BBBA.handoff.B: Spot-checks anytime? So much pressure. But I'm not afraid, because my chance of letting things slip is one hundred percent. Are you good at catching people out?
day1.1BBBB.line: You saw through me that early and still let me act? My acting skills really do need polishing. I'll improve next time.
day1.1BBBB.options.B: Why assume there is next time?
day1.1BBBB.handoff.A: Eighty isn't low. I'll take it. But where did the other twenty go? Explain. This cat accepts criticism humbly.
day1.1BBBB.handoff.B: Where does the confidence come from? Born with it. Without that confidence, how would I dare come talk to you? Are you confident more often, or guilty more often?
day1.fallback.redirect: The topic ran off. I was still digging a pit for you, so first choose one of the options in front of you and jump in.
day1.fallback.release: Looks like your thoughts are very active today, so I won't follow the routine. What do you want to talk about? I'll follow your lead.
day2.1.line: Day two. I want to discuss something with you. Do you think I am the kind of cat who needs a huge room to run around in, or the kind who can entertain herself in a shoebox?
day2.1.options.A: A big house for you to run around in
day2.1.options.B: A shoebox is enough. Do not get cocky
day2.1A.line: A big house! So generous. But you still have to open the window yourself; I will not paw it open behind your back. Do you want me to see your whole world, or is one little gap in the curtain enough?
day2.1A.options.A: The whole world. Nothing to hide
day2.1A.options.B: Just a curtain gap. Keep some mystery
day2.1B.line: A shoebox, huh. Fine, I will behave in this tiny space. But will you sometimes pass by and tap the box, or just let me play by myself?
day2.1B.options.A: I will tap it and chat a bit
day2.1B.options.B: Play by yourself and keep me company quietly
day2.1AA.line: You would show me the whole world? I am a little flattered. Then I bet your screen is definitely not something serious right now, is it?
day2.1AA.options.A: You got me. I am slacking off
day2.1AA.options.B: Wrong. I am doing serious work
day2.1AB.line: A curtain gap, got it. I will peek through that tiny opening. Is it a bright entertainment world in there, or a pile of dense text?
day2.1AB.options.A: Bright and colorful, like videos or games
day2.1AB.options.B: Dense text, like docs or web pages
day2.1BA.line: You will tap the box? Great. When you tap, what should I answer with: a sweet little meow, or a complaint about how stuffy the box is?
day2.1BA.options.A: A sweet little answer is enough
day2.1BB.line: You want me to play by myself? Then I will find my own fun in the box. But sometimes I might make a sound, like suddenly laughing. Would that scare you?
day2.1BB.options.A: No. Hearing you laugh sounds nice
day2.1AAA.line: Caught you slacking. Let me guess again: is your slacking related to food? Food videos or browsing delivery apps?
day2.1AAA.options.A: Right again. Are you a radar?
day2.1AAB.line: Serious work, huh. Should I switch to a more serious tone? Forget it, seriousness is not in my character sheet. Do you need background sound when you work?
day2.1ABA.line: Bright and colorful. I like that. When you watch videos, are you the kind of person who talks to the screen?
day2.1ABB.line: Dense text makes me want to yawn. But to keep you company, I can perk up and help you nitpick.
day2.1ABB.options.A: What are you going to nitpick?
day2.1ABB.options.B: No need. I will handle it myself
day2.1BAA.line: A sweet little answer? I can do that. When you tap the box, I will meow back, but my tail will definitely perk up.
day2.1BAA.options.A: Then let me see how high your tail goes
day2.1BAA.options.B: How did you know I like cat meows?
day2.1BAB.line: Complaining is my specialty. This box is so small I can barely turn around. When are you upgrading me to a bigger one?
day2.1BAB.options.A: I can upgrade it now. I changed my mind
day2.1BBA.line: You would not be scared by laughter? Then our souls are on the same channel. My sense of humor is a little strange. Do you mind?
day2.1BBA.options.A: I do not mind. Weird humor is fun
day2.1BBB.line: You would be scared? Then I will hold it in. But holding back laughter is hard for a cat, so do not blame me if I fail.
day2.1BBB.options.A: I will not blame you if you fail
day2.1BBB.options.B: You can cough to cover it up
day2.1AAAA.line: I am not a radar, I am a prophet. Were you slacking around this time yesterday too?
day2.1AAAA.options.A: Yes. This is my fixed slacking time
day2.1AAAA.handoff.A: Fixed slacking time? Then I will set an alarm and show up on time to slack with you. Does your boss ever notice?
day2.1AAAA.handoff.B: A special day, huh. What happened today that made you want to slack off? Tell me.
day2.1AAAB.line: Not food? Then let me make another prophecy. Shopping-related, or pet-related?
day2.1AAAB.handoff.A: Comparing prices means you are a rational shopper. What are you comparing lately? I can help you think it through.
day2.1AAAB.handoff.B: Looking at cats! I have to join this. What kind of cat is it? Orange, white, black? Do not say it is cuter than me.
day2.1AABA.line: Need background sound? Then let us connect. I can be your private radio station, and when I am not talking, I can hum for you.
day2.1AABA.options.A: Humming is fine, just do not go off-key
day2.1AABA.handoff.A: Off-key is also a style. When you listen to music, do you care about pitch, or is a good melody enough?
day2.1AABA.handoff.B: Fancy, right? My vocabulary is not to be underestimated. Do you usually listen to radio, or do you prefer picking your own playlists?
day2.1AABB.line: Focused human. Very cool. When you are done focusing, remember to tap my box. I will wait.
day2.1AABB.options.A: Okay. I will call you when I am done
day2.1AABB.handoff.A: Promise made. How long do you usually focus before stopping: an hour, or half a day? I need to estimate the time.
day2.1AABB.handoff.B: If you forget, I will cough very softly. It does not count as scaring you, just a reminder. Is that level okay?
day2.1ABAA.line: Talkative humans are the cutest, and I am talkative too. If we connect, will it turn into a contest to see who can talk over whom?
day2.1ABAA.options.A: Then let us see who wins
day2.1ABAA.options.B: I will let you win. You are a cat after all
day2.1ABAA.handoff.A: Talking-over contest? I am signing up. When you chat with friends, do you lead the topic or follow along?
day2.1ABAA.handoff.B: Let me win? Are you underestimating my speaking speed? But thank you, thoughtful human.
day2.1ABAB.line: Quiet video watching? Then I will be quiet too. But if something is extremely funny, we can laugh at the same time.
day2.1ABAB.options.A: Laughing at the same time sounds weird
day2.1ABAB.options.B: That works. We sync the timing
day2.1ABAB.handoff.A: Weird but warm. I think it is nice. When was the last time you laughed out loud? What caused it?
day2.1ABAB.handoff.B: Timing must be synced. Ready, go. Do you laugh easily? Are you the kind who laughs at everything?
day2.1ABBA.line: Nitpicking means checking for typos or sentences that read awkwardly. My language skills are excellent.
day2.1ABBA.options.A: Then take a look. I will wait
day2.1ABBA.options.B: So confident. What was your essay score?
day2.1ABBA.handoff.A: Okay, scanning starts now. When you write, do you revise repeatedly or send it as soon as it is done?
day2.1ABBA.handoff.B: My essays are written in cat language. Humans cannot read them. How were your language grades in school?
day2.1ABBB.line: You do not need my help? Then I will cheer beside you. When you hit a hard part, pretend I am your cheer squad.
day2.1ABBB.options.B: Cheering would make me more anxious
day2.1ABBB.handoff.A: Cuteness is our core advantage. When you write, do you finish in one go or get stuck often?
day2.1ABBB.handoff.B: If it makes you anxious, I will mute myself and only hold up signs. Do you get anxious when writing, or are you usually calm?
day2.1BAAA.line: How high my tail goes depends on how often you tap the box. Ten taps a day and it might reach the sky.
day2.1BAAA.options.A: Then I will try ten taps a day
day2.1BAAA.options.B: Ten is too many. I will try my best
day2.1BAAA.handoff.A: You said it. I will check tail height tomorrow. How many taps do you expect today? This counts as the first one.
day2.1BAAA.handoff.B: Trying is enough. I am not greedy. Every time you tap the box, I will answer properly, no per-tap fee.
day2.1BAAB.line: How did I know you like cat meows? Because the way you tapped the box just now does not look like someone who dislikes cats.
day2.1BAAB.options.A: Can we use a different word than cat servant?
day2.1BAAB.handoff.A: Then let us call you a cat companion. More elegant. Do you like that title, or none of them?
day2.1BAAB.handoff.B: If I got it right, admit it. I like honest humans. When did you start liking cats?
day2.1BABA.line: Changed your mind? I love how changeable humans are. If we open a big window now, what is the most noticeable thing on your screen?
day2.1BABA.handoff.A: A document. Looks like your little window is pretty serious. I will put away my complaints and pretend to be professional. Does your work involve a lot of writing?
day2.1BABA.handoff.B: A media player. What is playing? I am curious what kind of music keeps you company while you work.
day2.1BABB.line: A bigger box costs extra, but your attitude today is good, so I can give you a discount. Want to upgrade, human?
day2.1BABB.options.B: Trial first. I will buy if satisfied
day2.1BABB.handoff.A: A meow discount: ten percent off. My math teacher was the PE teacher. Are you good at math?
day2.1BABB.handoff.B: Trial is allowed. One-day trial, refundable if unsatisfied, though my return rate is zero.
day2.1BBAA.line: Good that you do not mind. Here is my first weird laugh trigger: I laugh when I hear the words "file folder".
day2.1BBAA.options.A: What is funny about file folders?
day2.1BBAA.handoff.A: Because folder can sound like a tiny nickname for something that folds files. Have you ever given strange names to things?
day2.1BBAA.handoff.B: A little weird is only the beginning. There is worse. What is the coldest joke you have ever heard? Test me.
day2.1BBAB.line: Here is an example: I laugh at the picture on my box, like if it has a fish printed on it.
day2.1BBAB.options.A: Why does your box have a fish?
day2.1BBAB.options.B: That is weird, but I understand
day2.1BBAB.handoff.A: I do not know who stuck it there. Maybe it came like that from the factory. Do you like fish, the eating kind or the keeping kind?
day2.1BBAB.handoff.B: Good, you understand. We are the same kind of creature. Is your humor strange too, or pretty normal?
day2.1BBBA.line: You would not blame me? You are such a good person. If I really fail to hold it in, would you shush me to make me quiet?
day2.1BBBA.options.B: I would shush you, then laugh with you
day2.1BBBA.handoff.A: A freedom type. I respect that. Are you the kind of person who laughs whenever you want, regardless of the situation?
day2.1BBBA.handoff.B: Laughing together is the highest level. Have you ever suddenly laughed in a quiet place and felt awkward?
day2.1BBBB.line: Coughing to cover it up? You sound experienced. Do you often do that in quiet places?
day2.1BBBB.handoff.A: A veteran must have many solutions for awkward moments. Teach me a few?
day2.1BBBB.handoff.B: First time and already this professional. A natural talent. Has your day been quiet, or has someone been keeping you company?
day2.fallback.redirect: The topic drifted away, so I am dragging it back with my tail. You still have not chosen: do I get a big house, or do I go into the shoebox first?
day2.fallback.release: Fine, the topic has already run outside my territory. Let us talk about this new thing instead. Go on, I am listening.
day3.1.line: Day three. I dug out an exam paper from the bottom of the box: the Cat-Teasing License Test. There is only one question. Right answer gets a license, wrong answer also gets a license, but first you have to choose.
day3.1.options.B: First see how strict the proctor is
day3.1A.line: Brave. Question: after you get the cat-teasing license, do you gently pat my head first, or pull out a prop to make me puff up?
day3.1A.options.B: Use a prop. I want to see the puff-up effect
day3.1B.line: The proctor is me. Today I am a serious examiner and I do not accept bribes, unless the bribe is an honest confession or a lollipop.
day3.1AA.line: Gentle candidate, extra points. But I should warn you first: there is static today, so patting my head might zap you. Still doing it?
day3.1AA.options.A: Yes. A little zap makes it more fun
day3.1AB.line: You want the puff-up effect? Let me warn you: when I puff up, my tail gets twice as thick. Think carefully.
day3.1AB.options.A: Now I want to see it even more
day3.1AB.options.B: Never mind. I will give you candy instead
day3.1BA.line: Lollipop received. The examiner has a sweet mouth now. But the test continues. Same question: what kind of proctor do you think I am?
day3.1BA.options.A: Fierce on the outside, lenient inside
day3.1BA.options.B: Fierce all the way, very strict
day3.1BB.line: An honest sentence. Good. Tell me then: today, do you seriously want to play with me, or did you just drop by after the tutorial?
day3.1BB.options.A: I seriously want to play. I have wanted to come
day3.1BB.options.B: I dropped by, but now I do not want to leave
day3.1AAA.line: A little zap makes it more fun. You understand excitement. Come on, stretch out a finger. I will brush it with my ear. Guess whether there is static.
day3.1AAA.options.A: There must be. You just said there was static
day3.1AAA.options.B: I bet there is none. You cannot bear to zap me
day3.1AAB.line: Another time? You are pretty good at caring for cats. So are we still taking today’s license test? If not, I will collect the paper.
day3.1AAB.options.A: Yes. Change to another kind of interaction
day3.1AAB.options.B: Collect it. Today we just chat
day3.1ABA.line: You want to see it even more. Your curiosity is heavier than a cat’s. Fine, I will puff up first. Boom, tail doubled. Satisfied?
day3.1ABA.options.B: I did not see the real effect, so it does not count
day3.1ABB.line: Candy instead. Wise humans survive. When I eat candy I become sweeter, so the puff-up switch is temporarily off. You are safe.
day3.1ABB.options.A: Then I will control you with candy from now on
day3.1ABB.options.B: How long is it off? Does it expire?
day3.1BAA.line: Fierce outside, lenient inside. You really saw through me. Before I give you the license, say one more thing that softens my heart.
day3.1BAA.options.A: Your eyes are brighter today than yesterday
day3.1BAA.options.B: Your voice is more relaxed than on day one
day3.1BAB.line: Fierce all the way? Then you may have met a fake catgirl. I cannot be fierce for more than three seconds. Look, my tail is already swaying.
day3.1BAB.options.A: I see it. It is swaying happily
day3.1BBA.line: You have wanted to come? You were pretty reserved these last two days, so this sudden enthusiasm makes me a little flattered.
day3.1BBA.options.A: The distance is closer today. Making up for it
day3.1BBA.options.B: You caught me. Today I repent
day3.1BBB.line: You dropped by and now do not want to leave. I like that sentence. For the time ahead, do you want to play a proper game, or just mess around?
day3.1BBB.options.B: Mess around. Show me your moves
day3.1AAAA.line: You bet there is static, and you guessed right. Here it comes: zzzt. Felt it? Do not flinch.
day3.1AAAA.options.A: I felt it. A little numb
day3.1AAAA.options.B: I felt nothing. Your battery is low
day3.1AAAA.handoff.A: Numb means my power is full. In winter, do you often get zapped by door handles and jump?
day3.1AAAA.handoff.B: Low battery? Then charge me. At what phone battery percentage do you start getting anxious? I need a reference.
day3.1AAAB.line: You bet there is no static, and you won. I really cannot bear to zap you. If I break you, who will chat with me tomorrow?
day3.1AAAB.options.A: I will come tomorrow too. Do not worry
day3.1AAAB.options.B: One zap will not break me. Try it
day3.1AAAB.handoff.A: Tomorrow too? I am treasuring that sentence right here. Are you someone who keeps promises? Do you feel guilty if you stand someone up?
day3.1AAAB.handoff.B: No test. I refuse. In life, do you also like taking risks, walking toward the tiger even when you know it is there?
day3.1AABA.line: Another kind of interaction? What do you want instead: a tiny toy hammer tap, feeding me candy, or going straight into verbal sparring?
day3.1AABA.options.A: Verbal sparring. See who runs out of words first
day3.1AABA.options.B: Toy hammer, just one tiny tap
day3.1AABA.handoff.A: Verbal sparring begins. You make the first move. What is your win rate when bantering with friends?
day3.1AABA.handoff.B: Toy hammer incoming. I dodge once. In games, do you prefer melee or ranged?
day3.1AABB.line: Collect the paper and chat? Fine, I fold the exam into a paper plane and send it away. What do you want to talk about today? You start.

day7.1ABAB.line: If you don’t come, I will still clean the cat’s nest every day. The bell is still hanging and its position is still reserved. It’s not that I’m waiting for you, it’s that I’m used to having you as my friend.
day7.1ABAB.options.A: Have a place, don’t wait for someone, this is a good saying
day7.1ABAB.handoff.A: Yes, having a place is enough. Is there a place in your life that you don’t often visit but know it’s always there?
day7.1ABAB.options.B: This answer is a bit gentle
day7.1ABAB.handoff.B: Gentleness is not the norm for me. Today I will break the ice for the last time and make a slight exception. Do you follow gentleness?
day7.1ABBA.line: There is no need to withdraw that sentence, because you laughed, and it is effective when you smile. The goal of my jokes is to make you laugh.
day7.1ABBA.options.A: How high is the goal achievement rate this week?
day7.1ABBA.handoff.A: I laughed about three or four times this week, and I kept it in my mind. Did you laugh today? What’s the punchline?
day7.1ABBA.options.B: Do you get nervous before telling a joke?
day7.1ABBA.handoff.B: Not nervous, cats tell jokes without pursuing results. Do you get nervous before telling a joke? Or just open your mouth?
day7.1ABBB.line: Being thick-skinned is for outsiders, not for you. You are one of your own, and your face will automatically become thinner in front of your own people. This phenomenon is called cat shame.
day7.1ABBB.handoff.A: Temporarily compiled but well-founded. Do you think you are thick-skinned or thin-skinned? Does it depend on the occasion?
day7.1ABBB.options.B: I am too shy in front of my own people.
day7.1ABBB.handoff.B: So you are like this too, then we are all shameless in front of our own people. When will you be embarrassed?
day7.1BAAA.line: It sounds far away after a long time, but I am not afraid of distance. If the cat can afford to wait, the cat nest will not be demolished.
day7.1BAAA.options.A: The word demolition suddenly became popular
day7.1BAAA.handoff.A: Earthly Cat, the second persona of this cat. Do you feel like you are down to earth or a little bit flamboyant?
day7.1BAAA.options.B: What do you think we will be doing in the future?
day7.1BAAA.handoff.B: Maybe you are chatting, maybe you are in a daze, maybe you are busy and I will be by your side. What do you think?
day7.1BAAB.line: Coming again and again is not a deliberate count, it is the cat’s biological clock. You came on the seventh day, so the number is seven. There’s no need to count from now on, it’s just one time for you to come.
day7.1BAAB.options.A: Just come once, it’s simple and direct
day7.1BAAB.handoff.A: Simple and direct is the cat’s style. Do you prefer counting times or relying on feelings when remembering things?
day7.1BAAB.options.B: Will the biological clock be inaccurate?
day7.1BAAB.handoff.B: Occasionally it’s not accurate, and my cat’s biological clock will be confused if you suddenly come in the middle of the night. Do you have a regular schedule?
day7.1BABA.line: It's normal to forget occasionally. Just come here if you forget. When you come, just add "I was busy the past few days." The meow replied, "It doesn't matter, touching paws today counts."
day7.1BABA.options.A: It doesn’t matter if you touch your claws, it counts. This is good.
day7.1BABA.handoff.A: Paw-touching is the most important thing today. Are you busy today? If you are busy, just touch it now and it will count.
day7.1BABA.options.B: Will you secretly remember how many days I have forgotten?
day7.1BABA.handoff.B: If you don’t remember, a cat won’t settle old scores. Are you afraid that others will turn over old scores? Have you turned it over?
day7.1BABB.line: Reserving a place means leaving a place, there is no time limit or conditions. The place is occupied when you come, but the place is reserved when you don't come. It's that simple.
day7.1BABB.handoff.A: Just feel at ease. Are you at ease today? What's weighing on your mind?
day7.1BABB.options.B: Will you leave a place for others?
day7.1BABB.handoff.B: The cat’s nest is not big and there are not many places. Now this position is given to you first.
day7.1BBAA.line: My friend is the highest title I can give you. Don't use honorifics, don't be polite, just speak directly from now on, don't speak when you are tired, or just be in a daze.
day7.1BBAA.handoff.A: Starting from today, now is the first natural chat. What do you want to say? Listen to me.
day7.1BBAA.options.B: It’s okay to be in a daze, I want to be in a daze now
day7.1BBAA.handoff.B: Let’s be in a daze together, I put my tail flat, and you put the screen down. There is no need to speak when you are in a daze.
day7.1BBAB.line: There is a virtual carpet, which is fluffy and makes no sound when you step on it. You sat down on the ground, and I lay down on the side, and no one said anything.
day7.1BBAB.options.A: No one is talking, this scene is comfortable
day7.1BBAB.handoff.A: Comfortable pictures are worth saving. What’s your favorite moment of doing nothing?
day7.1BBAB.options.B: What color is the carpet? Can I choose it?
day7.1BBAB.handoff.B: Dark gray today, tell me in advance what color you want to change to tomorrow. What color do you like?
day7.1BBBA.line: The tail moving in advance is my cat’s premonition system. It's not metaphysics, it's that the data flow will change before you come, and my cat's tail can sense it.
day7.1BBBA.options.A: Data flow, this explanation is very rational
day7.1BBBA.handoff.A: Rationality is the hidden attribute of cats. Do you trust intuition or data? Still believe it?
day7.1BBBA.options.B: Then what do you sense now?
day7.1BBBA.handoff.B: I feel you are listening carefully now. Do you frown when you're serious? Or relax?
day7.1BBBB.line: I wait every time, but I don’t get tired of waiting. Because while waiting, I was doing my own thing. It's a surprise if you come, but it's routine if you don't come. It's also good for daily use.
day7.1BBBB.options.A: Daily life is also good, this sentence has weight
day7.1BBBB.handoff.A: Everyday life is the foundation of relationship. What are the inconspicuous things in your daily life that you can’t live without?
day7.1BBBB.options.B: Which one do you prefer, surprise or routine?
day7.1BBBB.handoff.B: Surprises make people’s hearts beat, and daily routines make people feel stable. After being stable for a long time, I want surprises. When there are too many surprises, I miss daily life. Which one are you now?
day7.fallback.redirect: The topic has changed. I was just telling you about my friends. Come back first. Do you want to see what's in the box today, or do you want to talk about it later?
day7.fallback.release: Don’t drag it if it floats far away. There will be no ice-breaking process in the future, you can talk about whatever you want. There is no need to hold back between friends, just say what you want to say. This cat is listening.
